OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.仕方ない 面倒だけど勝ってみるか。: Fine. It's a pain, but I'll just have to win.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.진짜로 취하지 않았다니까. 근데... 너 왜 거꾸로 서 있는 거야?: I'm telling you, I'm not actually drunk. But... why are you standing upside down?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.本当に酔っ払ってないってば。ところで、あんた何で逆立ちしてるの?: I'm telling you, I'm not drunk. By the way, why are you standing on your head?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.술은 조금밖에 마시지 않았다니까~ 겨우 다섯 병 정도?: I barely drank anything~ Only about five bottles?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.お酒は少ししか飲んでないって 5本くらい。: I barely had anything to drink. Like, five bottles.
I studied martial arts? Very funny. I've forgotten all about that ancient history.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.私が武道を学んだ?冗談言わないで。そんな昔の話忘れたわ。: Me? Study martial arts? Don't make me laugh. I forgot all about that ancient history.
If you won't listen to reason, I've got no choice.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.話が通じないから仕方ないわね。: Can't reason with you, so whatever.
That's what you get for being a nuisance.
Haah... I told you not to pick a fight.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.だから飛びかかってこないでってばー: I said stop lunging at me!
I'm starting to feel... a hangover coming on.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.そろそろ、二日酔いが来そう…: Ugh, I think a hangover's coming on...
Seriously~ I can't take any more of this.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.もう、これ以上は無理。: I'm done. I can't take any more.
Again? This is such a pain.

Let me try swinging a little harder.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.もっと強く振り回してみましょうか。: Let me try swinging a bit harder.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.마음을 가다듬고... 힘낼게요!: Collecting myself... I'll give it my all!
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.心を落ち着かせて頑張りますね。: I'll calm my nerves and do my best.
Like an arrow... we can only move forward.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.矢のように、私たちは前に進むだけですね。: Like an arrow, we just keep moving forward.
People often call me a bookworm, but a real bookworm is a reader's most fearsome enemy.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.本の虫ってよく言われるのですが、実際の本の虫は読書家の第一の敵なんですよね。: People call me a bookworm, but real bookworms are a reader's worst enemy, you know.
When it comes to weapons, I prefer an encyclopedia.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.私は武器としては百科辞典が好きです。: As a weapon, I'm quite fond of the encyclopedia.
The world is not a place you can survive on kindness alone.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.世の中は優しさだけでは生きていけないんです。: You can't survive in this world on kindness alone.
Not every story can end happily, I suppose.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.物語がいつもハッピーだとは限りません。: Stories don't always have a happy ending.
It's a shame... but some things just can't be helped.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.残念ですが、仕方ないことですね。: What a shame, but it can't be helped.
It seems I'm the protagonist of the story today.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.今日は私が物語の主人公ですね。: Today, I'm the protagonist of the story.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.오늘은 어떤 이야기를 마주하게 될까요?: I wonder what kind of story I'll encounter today?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.今日はどのようなお話に出会えるでしょうか?: I wonder what kind of story I'll encounter today.

OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.고양이는 삶과 죽음. 어느 쪽을 선택할까요?: A cat, life and death. Which will it choose?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.猫は生と死、どちらを選ぶのでしょうか?: I wonder which will the cat choose — life, or death?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.윌슨이 말하는 꿈을 꿨어요. 윌슨은 심심하니까 다른 친구도 그려줘. 라고: I had a dream where Wilson spoke. He said he was bored, so draw him another friend.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.ウィルソンがお話をする夢を見ました。 ウィルソンは、退屈だから他の友達も描いて、: I had a dream where Wilson spoke to me. Wilson said he was bored and asked me to draw more friends.
In the dream, Wilson had the voice of a rather cynical old man. It startled me.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.夢の中でウィルソンはかなりシニカルなおじさんのボイスで驚きました。: In the dream, Wilson surprised me with a rather cynical old man's voice.
Living on only stretches out the hours of agony.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.生き続けたところで苦しい時間が長くなるだけです。: Living on only means more time spent in agony.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.죽음은, 안식과 같은 말이죠?: Death and rest... they're the same thing, aren't they?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.死は安息と同じ言葉でしょ?: Death and rest are the same thing, aren't they?
I told you not to touch me.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.放っておいてと言ったはずです。: I told you to leave me alone.
I didn't mean to go this far.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.ここまでするつもりはなかったんです。: I never meant for it to go this far.
Did it hurt? It always has for me.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.苦しかったでしょう。私はいつもそうでした。: It must have been painful. It always is for me.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.도망칠 수... 없는 거겠죠?: There's no... escaping this, is there?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.逃げられないのでしょう。: There's no escaping it, is there.
I've hurt just as much as you have.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.私もそれほど痛かった。: I know that pain. I've felt it just as much.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.살아남을 의미가 있는 걸까요?: Is there any meaning in surviving?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.生き残る意味があるのでしょうか: Is there even a reason to survive?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.저는 살아남아야만 하는 건가요…: Am I really meant to survive...?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.私は生き延びねばいけないのですか…: Do I really have to keep surviving…

Click to receive a blessing in Lady Aqua's voice.
Aqua.点击以让阿库娅大人藉由她的圣言来祝福你: Click to have Lady Aqua bless you with her sacred words.
Aqua.點擊以讓阿克婭大人藉由她的聖言來祝福你: Click to have Lady Aqua bless you with her sacred words.
Aqua.나는 아쿠아, 아쿠시즈교의 신앙의 대상이자, 물을 관장하는 여신이야!: I am Aqua, the object of faith of the Axis Order, and the goddess who governs water!
Aqua.더 떠받들어달라고! 나를 드높이라니까! 나 여신님인데요!!: Worship me more! Exalt my name! I'm a goddess, you know!!
Aqua.내가 누구냐고? 이름을 말 못해주지만, 지나가는 물의 여신님이야!: You ask who I am? I can't give you my name, but I'm just a passing goddess of water!
Aqua.회복도 지원도, 아크프리스트인 나에게 맡겨줘!: Leave the healing and support to me, an Arch-Priest!
Kazuma, I'm bored~. Play airplane with me~.
Aqua.여신인 내가 이런 웃기지도 않는 역할이라니, 인정 못해!: For a goddess like me to be stuck in such a ridiculous role — I refuse to accept this!
Sometimes, I just want to sit back and enjoy some bubbly in peace.
Aqua.우우… 비려… 비려어…: Uwuu... I wanna go home... I wanna go hooome...
Aqua.빨리 마왕을 쓰러뜨리고, 이 세상 좀 어떻게 해봐!: Just hurry up and defeat the Demon King already, and do something about this world!
Aqua.나한테 맡겨줘! 갓-스매시를 보여줄테니까~!: Leave it to me! I'll show you my God Blow~!
Aqua.열심히 일해서, 언젠가 마구간살이에서 벗어나야지!: I have to work hard and someday get out of living in that stable!
Aqua.오늘도 사장님한테 칭찬받았어!: The boss praised me again today!
Aqua.어째서 헤스티아는 신님이라고 믿어주는데?! 나도 여신인데!!: Why does everyone believe Hestia is a goddess?! I'm a goddess too!!
Aqua.오늘밤은 축제야! 맛있는 과자랑 슈와슈와로, 아침까지 달려보자!: Tonight's a festival! Let's party till morning with tasty snacks and bubbly!
Aqua.잠깐, 메구밍! 와봐, 와봐! 여기에 특이한 물고기가 있어!: Wait, Megumin! Come here, come here! There's a weird fish over here!
Aqua.\"단순한 인간한테는 흥미없어요\"? 괜찮아, 나는 진짜 여신이니까!: "I'm not interested in mere humans"? That's fine — I'm a real goddess after all!
Aqua.카즈마! 힘들어! 어부바해줘, 어부바!: Kazuma! I'm tired! Carry me on your back, carry me!
Aqua.저기여~ 밥 아직~? 배고픈데~: Heyyy~ Is the food ready yet~? I'm hungry~.
Aqua.여신은 섬세하다니까! 조용한 방이랑 따뜻한 이불이 없으면 못 잔단 말야!: Goddesses are delicate, you know! I can't sleep without a quiet room and a warm blanket!
I should be grateful for my life now. I never want to sleep in straw again.
Aqua.영혼이 명령할 때, 진정한 예술은 오직 스스로가 만들어내는 거야!: When the soul commands, true art can only be created by oneself!
I'll apologize for purifying the hot spring water, but I'm a goddess — I couldn't help it~.
Aqua.흐흥, 이게 여신님 특제 케이크야. 맛있어보이지!: Heh, this is the goddess's special cake. Looks delicious, doesn't it!
Aqua.화조풍월~! 역시 퀘스트가 끝난 후에는 슈와슈와가 최고야!: The beauty of nature~! As expected, nothing beats bubbly after finishing a quest!
Aqua.기껏 이쪽 세계에 왔는 걸~. 재밌는 기억을 잔뜩 만들어줬으면 해!: You've come all the way to this world~. I hope you make tons of wonderful memories!
Click or press the N key to receive a blessing in Lady Aqua's voice.
Aqua.点击或按下N键以让阿库娅大人藉由她的圣言来祝福你: Click or press N to have Lady Aqua bless you with her sacred words.
Aqua.點擊或按下N鍵以讓阿克婭大人藉由她的聖言來祝福你: Click or press N to have Lady Aqua bless you with her sacred words.
Aqua.私はアクシス教の神聖なる化身、水を司る女神！: I am the sacred embodiment of the Axis Cult, the goddess who commands water!
Aqua.もっと甘やかして！ 崇めて！ 私は女神なんだから！: Spoil me more! Worship me! I'm a goddess, after all!
Aqua.私は誰でしょう？ 名前は言えないけど、通りすがりの水の女神です！: Who am I, you ask? I can't say my name, but I'm just a passing-through water goddess!
Aqua.回復も支援も、大司祭である私に任せて！: Leave the healing and support to me, the Arch Priest!
Aqua.カズマさ〜ん、退屈だよ〜！ 高い高いして！: Kazumaaaa, I'm bored~! Lift me up, lift me up!
Aqua.女神である私が、こんな馬鹿げた役をやるなんて認めない！: I refuse to accept that I, a goddess, have to play such a ridiculous role!
Aqua.たまには、静かにシュワシュワを飲みたい時もある…: Sometimes, I just want to sit back and drink some bubbly in peace...
Aqua.魔王を早く倒して、この世界をなんとかしてよ！: Just hurry up and defeat the Demon King already! Do something about this world!
Aqua.任せて！ ゴッドスマッシュを見せてあげるから！: Leave it to me! I'll show you my God Blow!
Aqua.獲物確保、水の女神アクア参上！: Target secured! Aqua, the water goddess, has arrived!
Aqua.一生懸命働いて、いつか厩舎暮らしから抜け出さなきゃ！: I've got to work hard and someday get out of this stable life!
Aqua.なぜエスティアが女神だと信じられてるの？ 私も女神なんだよ？: Why does everyone believe Eris is a goddess? I'm a goddess too, you know?
Aqua.今夜はお祭り！ 美味しいお菓子と炭酸飲料で朝までパーティーしよう！: Tonight's a festival! Let's party till morning with delicious sweets and fizzy drinks!
Aqua.ねえめぐみん！ こっち来て！ ここに変な魚がいるよ！: Hey, Megumin! Come over here! There's a weird fish over here!
Aqua.私はただの人間には興味ないの。大丈夫！ 本物の女神だから！: I'm not interested in ordinary humans. It's fine! Because I'm a real goddess!
Aqua.カズマ！ 疲れた！ おんぶして！ おんぶ！: Kazuma! I'm tired! Carry me! Piggyback! Piggyback!
Aqua.ねえ、ご飯まだ？ お腹すいたよ…: Hey, is food ready yet? I'm hungry...
Aqua.女神は繊細なんだから！ 静かな部屋と暖かい布団がないと眠れないの！: A goddess is delicate, you know! I can't sleep without a quiet room and a warm futon!
Aqua.今の暮らしに感謝しなきゃ。もう藁の上で寝るなんて想像したくもないから。: I need to be grateful for my current lifestyle. I never want to imagine sleeping on straw again.
Aqua.魂が命じる時、真の技は自らが成すもの！: When the soul commands, true skill manifests on its own!
Aqua.温泉の水を浄化してごめんね、でも私は女神だから仕方ないでしょ？: Sorry for purifying the hot spring water, but I'm a goddess — I can't help it, can I?
Aqua.ふふん、これが私特製の女神ケーキ！どう？ 美味しそうでしょ？: Heh heh, behold my very own goddess cake! Well? Looks delicious, doesn't it?
Aqua.自然の美しさ〜！ クエストの後はやっぱり炭酸飲料が最高！: The beauty of nature~! After a quest, nothing beats a fizzy drink!
Aqua.この世界に来たからには、楽しい思い出をたくさん作ってほしい！: Now that you've come to this world, I hope you make lots of wonderful memories!

OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.이런 세상에서 점성술이 쓸모가 있나고요? 의외로 장사가 되더라고요, 후훗: Is astrology even useful in a world like this? Surprisingly, it's quite good for business. Heheh.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.こんな世の中なのに、先制術がまだ使い道があるのかですって?意外と商売になるのです: In a world like this, you ask if astrology still has its uses? It turns out to be quite the business.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.앞이 보이지 않을 때 우리는 빛에 의지하죠. 하늘의 별이나 달을 말하는: When we can't see what's ahead, we rely on light. You mean the stars and the moon? No, I mean the flashlight on your phone.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.前が見えないとき、我々は光に頼ります。 空の星や月のことを想像しましたか? いい: When we can't see ahead, we turn to the light. Did you imagine the stars and moon in the sky? No — it's your smartphone's flashlight.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.물에 잠긴 달, 고정된 북극성, 그리고 지나치는 화성. 와... 흉성이네: The moon submerged in water, the North Star fixed in place, and Mars passing by. My... that's an ominous sign.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.水に浸かる月、固定された北極星、そして過ぎ去りし火星、強勢ですね。: The moon submerged in water, the fixed North Star, and Mars now passed — a powerful alignment.
Death is the one fate none of us can escape.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.死は我々が唯一避けられない運命。: Death is the one fate none of us can escape.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.이것도 하나의 운명일까요?: Is this also a matter of fate?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.これも一つの運命なのでしょうか。: Could this, too, be one of fate's designs?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.運命はどこに私たちを呼んだのでしょうか。: Where has fate called us to, I wonder?
Accepting the outcome is an important thing.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.結果を受け入れることは大事なことです。: Accepting the outcome is what matters.
The end of fate, the final stop of time. May you find eternal rest...
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.運命の終わり、時間の終着駅、永久の安らぎを。: The end of fate, the final stop of time, eternal rest.
While you're alive, you have to live your best.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.生きている間は最善を尽くさなければなりません。: We must give our best while we still live.
We can't stop. Just like the stars keep moving.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.止められません。天体の動きのように。: It cannot be stopped. Like the movement of the celestial bodies.

As a Crusader, I must fulfill my duty to the very end.
Darkness.머뭇거리지 마! 필요하다면 적과 함께 나도 공격해!: Don't hesitate! If you have to, attack me along with the enemies!
Darkness.대역이라도 망설이지 말고 마음껏 명령해!: Even as a substitute, don't hold back — order me however you like!
Darkness.갑옷 없이 이런 강한 일격을 맞는다면... 뭐, 그래도 모험은 계속해야지: Taking a hit like that without my armor... Well, the adventure must go on!
Darkness.그, 그게 부대 이름이라도 상관없으니까… 라라티나라고 부르지 마!: I-It doesn't matter if it's just a unit name or whatever... just don't call me Lalatina!
Darkness.성전사는 추위에 굴복하지 않아. 오히려 나는 그것을 반긴다!: A Crusader does not yield to the cold. If anything, I welcome it!
Darkness.자, 잠깐만! 그거 당기지 마! 지금 당장 멈춰!: W-Wait a moment! Don't pull that! Stop it right now!
Darkness.타워 실드라... 믿음직하긴 한데, 왜 이렇게 짜증나는 거지!: A tower shield... it's reliable, sure, but why is it so frustrating!
Darkness.파티의 방패가 되어서 마왕군에게 잡히다니… 으윽, 상상만 해도!: Being the party's shield and getting captured by the Demon King's Army... Ugh, just imagining it!
Darkness.관중들이 전부 날 보고 있어… 윽!: Everyone in the crowd is watching me... Ngh!
Darkness.나, 나, 나, 나도 여자라고요! 딱딱하다거나 괴력녀라고 부르면... 상: I-I-I-I'm a woman too, you know! Calling me hard as a rock or a muscle freak... that actually hurts!
Hehehehehe... What am I doing? Isn't it obvious? It's my daily knitting routine.
Darkness.상대가 누구든, 내 임무는 변하지 않아. 덤벼라—나는 벽이다!: No matter who the opponent is, my duty never changes. Come at me — I am the wall!
Darkness.이 엄청난 조임이라니! 역시 크라켄, 기대를 뛰어넘는군!: What incredible tightening! As expected of a Kraken — it surpasses all expectations!
Darkness.지금은 경장비를 입었지만, 나는 여전히 십자군이다. 자, 나에게 네 최고: I may be in light equipment right now, but I am still a Crusader. Come, give me your best strike!
Darkness.나는 마지막 순간까지 저항할 것이다, 내 길을 막지 마라!: I will resist until my very last moment — do not stand in my way!
Since ancient times, it has been the fate of female knights to suffer humiliation at the hands of the Demon King.
Drinking quietly like this... isn't so bad once in a while.
Darkness.이 몸이 부서진다 해도, 나는 절대 악에 굴복하지 않을 것이다!: Even if this body is broken, I will never yield to evil!
Darkness.고통이 무서워? 나는 아니야 — 고통은 내가 가장 좋아하는 것 중 하나라: Afraid of pain? Not me — pain happens to be one of my favorite things!
Darkness.私の攻撃が当たってる！本当に当たってる！: My attacks are actually hitting! They're really hitting!
Darkness.アイズの剣の訓練はすごいよ！攻撃が当たるスリルにハマりそう！: Aiz's sword training is incredible! I think I'm hooked on the thrill of actually landing a hit!
Darkness.体力と持久力には自信があるけど、不器用すぎて攻撃が全然当たらない…: I'm confident in my stamina and endurance, but I'm so clumsy that my attacks never land...
Darkness.聖騎士として、最後まで使命を果たさねばならない。: As a Crusader, I must fulfill my duty to the very end.
Darkness.ためらうな！必要なら敵と一緒に俺を攻撃しろ！: Don't hesitate! If you must, attack me along with the enemy!
Darkness.パーティーの足を引っ張るようなことがあれば強めに罵ってくれ!: If I ever hold the party back, feel free to berate me harshly!
Darkness.鎧がないこの状態で、もし重い一撃をくらったら…よし!クエストに行こう!: Without my armor, if I were to take a heavy blow... Alright! Let's go on a quest!
Darkness.い、いくらユニット名でもラルティーナと呼ばないでくれ!: E-even as a unit name, please don't call me Lalatina!
Darkness.クルセイダーは寒さになんて屈しない。むしろ歓迎するわ！: A Crusader does not yield to the cold. If anything, I welcome it!
Darkness.ちょ、引っ張るな!や、やめ、やめろー!: H-hey, stop pulling! N-no, stop, stoooop!
Darkness.大盾か…確かに頼もしいが…なんだこのもどかしさは…: A greatshield... It is reassuring, certainly, but... why does this feel so frustrating...
